text: You think you're a gym person but haven't been in months. Time to reevaluate who you are and what you want. Discipline is not a trait, it's a choice.
decision_reason: Directly addresses the audience's pain point of feeling stuck and challenges their identity as a gym person.

text: Going back to the gym after 2 months off isn't easy. But every rep is a reminder that I'm one step closer to my goals. Keep moving forward, no matter how small the step.
decision_reason: Shares a personal experience of struggling to get back to the gym, making the audience feel less alone.

text: The gym isn't just about physical growth, it's about building discipline. Every rep is a chance to reframe your mindset and prove to yourself that you're capable of more.
decision_reason: Offers a fresh perspective on the gym, focusing on building discipline and reframing one's mindset.
